18.salu: the warmth and connection felt when sharing knowledge or understanding with others
18.veth: the act of moving with purpose toward a shared goal, especially when exploring or building something
18.zeth: a collective journey toward a shared destination, especially one that unites us in purpose and stren

19.law: a rule created to guide behavior and maintain order in a community
